generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts put us all at risk. We need robust local readiness programs - they're not just about safety, they're about maintaining our way of life. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
